fato_historico: 2012: Syrian civil war: The People's Protection Units (YPG) capture the cities of Amuda and Efrîn without resistance.
energia_do_dia: Today, your Leo spirit may feel an extra surge of golden confidence. Much like peaceful resolutions that unfold in quiet corners of the world, it is a good time to consider how gentle strength can overcome obstacles. Embrace your innate leadership by approaching challenges with grace rather than force, allowing your warm, magnetic personality to lead the way forward.
frase_do_dia: True strength resides in the peaceful alignment of your heart and your actions.
significado_numero: Represents the mastery of building dreams with steady and patient hands.
conselho: Lead with kindness today and watch how easily doors open for you.
